_README: REPLACE THESE WITH REAL, VERIFIED OPENINGS BEFORE GOING LIVE.
_HOW: Open the company's OWN careers site. Copy the role, eligibility, batch, location and closing date exactly as stated there. Paste the official URL. Do not copy from a WhatsApp forward, a Telegram channel, or an aggregator — those are where fake fresher drives come from.
_RULES: url must be https and on a domain in OFFICIAL_DOMAINS (jobs_board.py). last_date must be YYYY-MM-DD. Any entry that is incomplete, expired, or not on an official domain is dropped automatically and never shown.

_comment: EXAMPLE of a correctly-filled entry. The URL below is TCS's real official fresher hiring portal. VERIFY the role, eligibility, batch and closing date on that page yourself, then correct the fields — do not trust the values written here.
